ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "app_id" TEXT /* ID of the application associated with the model */,
  "app_title" TEXT /* Title of the application */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., stochastic, deterministic) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the model (e.g., transmission rate, infectious period) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each task */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with the task */,
  "task_text" TEXT /* Text of the task */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Description of the task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of the task (e.g., simulation, quiz) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tasks_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the simulation */,
  "simulation_number" INTEGER /* Number of simulations */,
  "random_seed" INTEGER /* Random seed used for the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the simulation */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the simulation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation associated with the result */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the simulation */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., numeric, text) */,
  "visualization" TEXT /* Visualization of the result (e.g., graph, chart) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the assignment */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, not submitted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment associated with the submission */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date of the submission */,
  "submission" TEXT /* Submission (e.g., file, text) */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade of the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the teacher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the teacher */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the teacher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher associated with the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the enrollment */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date of the enrollment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the analytics entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the analytics entry */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Metric (e.g., score, time) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the analytics entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the feedback */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the student */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the progress */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course associated with the progress */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the task associated with the progress */,
  "progress" REAL /* Progress of the student (e.g., 0-100) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES tasks ("task_id")
)
